description: Index lifecycle state transition contracts - layered by confidence level

framework_level_candidates.description: Behaviors expected across vector databases (verified on Milvus v2.6.10)

contracts.name: Create Index State Transition
contracts.statement: create_index creates index metadata without loading collection

contracts.name: Search Precondition Gate
contracts.statement: search on unloaded collection fails predictably
contracts.evidence: search raises exception when collection not loaded

contracts.name: Load State Transition
contracts.statement: load transitions collection from NotLoad to Loaded
contracts.evidence: load_state changes from NotLoad to Loaded after load()

contracts.name: Loaded Search Baseline
contracts.evidence: search returns results when collection is Loaded

contracts.name: Release State Transition
contracts.statement: release unloads collection while preserving index metadata and data
contracts.evidence: load_state=NotLoad after release, index_metadata_exists=true, storage_count unchanged

contracts.name: Reload After Release
contracts.statement: reload restores searchable state with same data
contracts.evidence: load_state=Loaded after reload, search results match pre-release

contracts.name: Documented NotLoad Behavior
contracts.statement: create_collection without index results in NotLoad state

milvus_validated.description: Behaviors verified on Milvus v2.6.10, may vary across implementations

contracts.name: Post-Drop Search Semantics
contracts.statement: after drop_index, load fails and search is unavailable
contracts.milvus_behavior: load() raises 'index not found', search fails with precondition gate
contracts.note: Other implementations may allow brute force search without index

contracts.name: Post-Insert Visibility
contracts.statement: insert visibility requires flush for count and search
contracts.milvus_behavior: flush enables both storage_count and search visibility
contracts.evidence: ILC-009b: immediate search found existing vector (not unique), after_flush found exact match (id=0, score=0.0)
contracts.note: ILC-009b conclusively proved flush is required for search visibility

contracts.name: Post-Insert Search Timing
contracts.statement: inserted vector requires flush for search visibility with exact match
contracts.evidence: unique vector (128-dim) not found immediately (score=27.27), found after flush with exact match (score=0.0)

pending_investigation.description: Experiments that need redesign or further investigation

milvus_specific_observed.description: Behaviors specific to Milvus v2.6.10, not necessarily universal

behaviors.error: vector index cannot be dropped on loaded collection

behaviors.behavior: utility.load_state() returns LoadState enum, not string
collection.num_entities may not reflect recent inserts without flush
behaviors.evidence: storage_count unchanged before flush, visible after flush

flush.description: Flush inserted data to persistent storage
flush.milvus_behavior: enables storage_count visibility, index update delayed

visibility.storage: requires flush for count visibility (Milvus v2.6.10)

L3_ReleasePreserves.verification: index_metadata_exists AND load_state == NotLoad AND storage_count_unchanged

classification_types.EXPERIMENT_DESIGN_ISSUE: Test design issue, not product bug
